items.title: Forbidden Controls in Catalyst: Optimize Interface for Mac
items.summary: Investigating why certain UIKit controls throw runtime exceptions in Catalyst's 'Optimize Interface for Mac' mode and discovering which controls are forbidden.

items.title: Disabling Keyboard Avoidance in SwiftUI's UIHostingController
items.summary: Fixing unwanted keyboard avoidance behavior in UIHostingController using runtime dynamic subclassing to override keyboard notification handling methods.

items.title: The State of SwiftUI
items.summary: Testing SwiftUI's production readiness in iOS 14 and macOS Big Sur through Apple's Fruta sample app, revealing performance issues and platform-specific limitations.
